title: ROBO-FERMIER
subtitle: Proiectarea și Dezvoltarea Platformei Modulare Robotice ROBO-FERMIER
description: A guide for designing and developing the modular robotic platform ROBO-FERMIER for precision agriculture. It details project goals, phases, technologies and tools enabling autonomous tasks such as mowing, weeding, disease monitoring and the targeted application of fertilizers and pesticides in orchards.
